title: KRILLKRAFT
description: A sweet n' scary wonderland filled with fiery meteors, toxic waste, abyssal oceans, and prehistoric alien magic...
body:
![KRILLKRAFT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ce43513daf89ff0326e264149da2957e5baa404.png)
### The **ULTIMATE SURVIVAL MODPACK** where _Enhanced Vanilla_ meets *Prehistoric Alien Magic!* 

- I am **ALWAYS** updating and adding to this pack, feels like modern day **CRAZYCRAFT** !
- Only the most creative, polished and over-all best mods available on **FORGE 1.20.1**

# ⋆｡°✩❗ **PLAYTESTERS NEEDED** ❗✩°｡⋆
### **KRILLKRAFT** has been a **solo project** for years now, it's time people started yelling at me to fix it! 
- If you'd like to be a part of that, I've created a **DISCORD** linked here:

![DISCORDLOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eab93dac2f2c1f8f32a763432bcfaef3589baa22.png)

# [JOIN KRILLKRAFT HERE](https://discord.gg/vVcArndkDY) 🔥☄️

# 🌌 **CORE ASPECTS** 🌌

# 🏃‍♂️ [ParCool!](https://modrinth.com/mod/parcool) 🏃‍♀️
- **KRILLKRAFT** is heavily focused on **EXPLORATION** and **LOOTING**, so I fixed you some **upgraded movement** 
- The mod is preconfigured to **disable** abilities I deem **unnecessary** for casual gameplay (Press **K** in-game to view keybinds)

![PARCOOL](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/704d55adb1e32947d2db8827d3b330febdfdf01d.webp)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/NCykaIti9xU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

</details>

# ☁️ [AETHER](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether) ☁️
- The Aether adds a breathtaking sky dimension filled with floating islands, mythical creatures, powerful gear, and challenging dungeons to conquer ⚔️

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![AETHER LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94bbd76d44542c08170058f58e952afc17674d95.webp)
![AETHER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00049d51e57be7960c9888b7af082769b5d042c4.png)
![GILDED GROVES [Aether: Redux]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7aabc101cff614c5e92f241d03e4f7e8fa4c60c.png)
![SKYFIELDS [Aether: Redux]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10bbd340ec3eb2a10989b8df1d6f5beec43abe8e.png)
![CLOUDCAPS [Aether: Redux]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d33e81354371d9d6c721752869cc7e7d8963f243.png)

</details>

# 🍭 [ALEX'S CAVES](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves) 🍭
- Transforms underground exploration with six incredibly made cave biomes all possessing unique mechanics to transform your world even more 💎⛏️
- Start by finding an **underground cabin** to begin the spelunking

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![CANDY CAVITY](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/feb71769569dc7c07956b51928a9a3d9971f9d94.jpeg)
![PRIMORDIAL CAVES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bee9af127041afd18b0ee810c98240292ffd8c7.jpeg)
![MAGNETIC CAVES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed6c79728de89602ea80f589989c7839a6d80cba.jpeg)
![ABYSSAL CHASM](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c48a348933a4cc5580f1020e338236ca452b20d.webp)

</details>

# 🪐 [AD ASTRA](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra) 🪐
- Build rockets, craft a spacesuit and **go to SPACE**!!! ✨
- **Explore planets** across the Solar System, and build advanced **space colonies** using immersive but simple-to-use technology and machinery! 🌙

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![AD ASTRA BANNER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b91ffb68215fd78819763b5e78ee8307e54cdc4.png)
![SPACESUITS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9268c99b0c8747b02433f4b9fb6021e9c238bb2b.png)
![MOON BASE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f26b235a31c5137763a14956f08a371862971ae.png)
![MERCURY](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/744ca1cfbcfa8e94867a78139d9d7b5b25bc7e28.png)
![MOON BASE 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f0e08dbcd7d7bebcf336b4a11eb63608942955b.png)

</details>

# ☄️ [SKYFALL: METEORITES](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyfall-meteorites/versions) ☄️
- Fiery, angry **asteroids** rain down to squish you like a **pancake** 🥞
- Some contain valuable resources, while some may have *personality*... 👽

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![METEOR](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20f80173803abc2c93c668d8515f47e2bd2aa1d4_0.webp)
![METEOR CLOSE TO GROUND](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b4eb1a9f10f101e6e4773a09144d2b93d5ca100.jpeg)
![METEOR IMPACT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4662839d2727f6deb2832dedfb1ab6648faa5770.jpeg)
![METEOR CLUSTER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5331d071ffa94c8569fb32e0f713dfdadf27aa5d.jpeg)
![CRATER AFTERMATH](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc62a698d3f3b8ece60d8c87902870ab872cae78.jpeg)

</details>

# 🔥 [BURNT BASIC](https://modrinth.com/mod/burnt-basic) 🔥
- Beautiful, "realistic" **fire** and **wildfire** mechanics to add to the devestation 🔥
- Adds **life** to your world by adding a little more *death* ! 🔥

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
 
![METEOR SITE IN FOREST](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52bc60be51f8c62ca2c7a687d2bee3fc8ead69a2.jpeg)
![FOREST FIRE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f28a43a0d08e2dc0d8a31273cb8bd7435f85d99.jpeg)
![CHARRED BIRCH FOREST](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6030c1b8c7c94011feb3f6e2d3e760ebef23466d.jpeg)

</details>

# 🌍 [GEOLIPHIC](https://modrinth.com/datapack/geophilic) 🌍 etc.
- **Biomes** and **dimensions** have been overhauled with mods like [Geoliphic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/geophilic), [Herios' Floral Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/herios-floral-expansion), [Windswept](https://modrinth.com/mod/windswept), [Jaden's Nether Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/jadens-nether-expansion) and [Incendium](https://modrinth.com/datapack/incendium) 🏔️

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
![GIANT FLOWER PLAINS WITH HOGS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41b9ff72836ddd3861b1a7b34d88a8d0305f3e1c.jpeg)
![GIANT FLOWER PLAINS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f25ae661e1777a72eb4e42ec046af59b0940429d.jpeg)
![WINDSWEPT TUNDRA](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/378cf4b48f31ac65a34774f3e7694dcd74a3f990.png)
![WINDSWEPT PINE BARRENS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ddd5ad7cc7d9f107df3808fe652d2baa411d8b3.png)
![HEART CRYSTAL CAVERN](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08a99d859bf4e5612be35fe2724495d497bc0eae_0.webp)

</details>

### ⋆｡°✩ ALL MODS ARE AIMED TO EFFICIENTLY SYNERGIZE ✩°｡⋆

# 💥 **Play SOON on our dedicated server!**
